'''Tev Driscull''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was a commodities shipper and the original owner of the ''[[Nova Whisper]]''. He soon lost it at [[Elshandruu Pica]] to a privateer named [[Dharus]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

{{Char-stub}}
